rulings.Case Title: LAURA ESMERALDA CONTRERAS VS. CAROL BUTERWORTH et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion For Good Faith Settlement Determination
rulings.Rulings: Unlawful Detainer Law and Motion Calendar for Thursday October. 11, 2012. Line 1 -DEFENDANT CAROL BUTTERWORTH and GORDON BUTTERWORTH's Motion For Good Faith Settlement Determination. Defendant's Motion for Good Faith Settlement Determination is granted. No opposition filed. =(501/AJR)

rulings.Case Title: FLORA NG VS. STERLING REAL ESTATE PARNERS II, LLC
rulings.Calendar Matter: Defendant Joshua Fischer'S Motion To Set Aside Default/Default Judgment
rulings.Rulings: Unlawful Detainer Law and Motion Calendar for Thursday October. 11, 2012. Line 2 - Defendant Joshua Fischer'S Motion To Set Aside Default/Default Judgment. Defendant Joshua Fischer's Motion to Set Aside Default is granted. No opposition filed.=(501/AJR)

rulings.Case Title: RAYMOND GARCIA VS. BENITA RAMOS et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion For Leave Of Court To File A Motion For Judgment On The Pleadings
rulings.Rulings: Unlawful Detainer Law and Motion Calendar for Thursday October. 11, 2012. Line 3 - PLAINTIFF RAYMOND GARCIA's Motion And Motion For Leave Of Court To File A Motion For Judgment On The Pleadings. Plaintiff's Motion for Leave to File a Motion fro Judgment on the Pleadings is granted. No opposition filed. =(501/AJR)

rulings.Case Title: CONSTANCE BOURGES VS. DANY SCHER et al
rulings.Rulings: Unlawful Detainer Law and Motion Calendar for Thursday October. 11, 2012. Line 4 - DEFENDANT DANNY SCHER's DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT. Defendant's Demurrer is sustained in part and overruled in part. Demurrer is sustained with leave to amend to allege in good faith facts re: (1) foreseeability of harm; (2) applicability of CCC 846; and (3) premises being public property; (4) existence of landlord-tenant relationship Demurrer is overruled as to the entire complaint for uncertainty Demurrer is overruled as to nuisance cause of action. Nuisance is sufficiently alleged at this stage of the pleadings. =(501/AJR)

rulings.Case Title: CONSTANCE BOURGES VS. DANY SCHER et al
rulings.Rulings: Unlawful Detainer Law and Motion Calendar for Thursday October. 11, 2012. Line 4 - DEFENDANT DANNY SCHER's MOTION TO STRIKE 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT. Motion to strike is granted with leave to amend for P to allege in good faith facts re: malice, oppression or fraud. Defendant shall make proper citations to authorities in future. See Moving Papers 6:13-14; 9:18)=(501/AJR)

rulings.Case Title: CARDIOVASCULAR ASSOCIATES RETIREMENT PLAN VS. RICHARD LOHR DBA AUTO 360 et al
rulings.Rulings: Unlawful Detainer Law and Motion Calendar for Thursday October. 11, 2012. Line 7 - DEFENDANT RICHARD LOHR DBA AUTO 360's DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT. Defendant's Demurrer is sustained without leave to amend. Notice is fatally defective. =(501/AJR)

rulings.Case Title: WCPII, LLC A CALIFORNIA LIMITED LIABILITY VS. TEAM GOLDEN GATE INC. DBA TEAM GOLDEN GATE et al
rulings.Rulings: Unlawful Detainer Law and Motion Calendar for Thursday October. 11, 2012. Line 8 - DEFENDANT TEAM GOLDEN GATE INC. DBA TEAM GOLDEN GATE and DAVID WILCOX's MOTION TO STRIKE 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT. Defendant's Motion to Strike is granted without leave to amend. P failed to cite any authority for the proposition that "amendment" was proper. Lee does not address this issue. =(501/AJR)

rulings.Case Title: WCPII, LLC A CALIFORNIA LIMITED LIABILITY VS. TEAM GOLDEN GATE INC. DBA TEAM GOLDEN GATE et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Mtn To Compel Further Responses And Production To Doc Demand
rulings.Rulings: Unlawful Detainer Law and Motion Calendar for Thursday October. 11, 2012. Line 8 - PLAINTIFF WCPII, LLC A CALIFORNIA LIMITED LIABILITY's Motion To Compel Further Responses And Production To Document Demand. Plaintiff's Motion to Compel further Responses to Discovery. Counsels are ordered to appear at 9:00 a.m. and engage in further meet-and-confer efforts. Parties to advise the Court of the remaining issues re: Amended Responses. =(501/AJR)

rulings.Case Title: WCPII, LLC A CALIFORNIA LIMITED LIABILITY VS. TEAM GOLDEN GATE INC. DBA TEAM GOLDEN GATE et al
rulings.Rulings: Unlawful Detainer Law and Motion Calendar for Thursday October. 11, 2012. Line 8 - DEFENDANT TEAM GOLDEN GATE INC. DBA TEAM GOLDEN GATE and DAVID WILCOX's DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT. Defendant's Demurrer is overruled. Complaint sufficiently alleges unlawful detainer based on 30 day notice. =(501/AJR)

rulings.Case Title: KING BUN CHAN VS. FRANK CHOW et al
rulings.Rulings: Unlawful Detainer Law and Motion Calendar for Thursday October. 11, 2012. Line 5 - DEFENDANT FRANK CHOW's DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT. Defendant's Demurrer to First Amended Complaint is sustained with leave to amend. Defendant established how the prior allegations are destructive of the sole cause of action asserted in First Amended Complaint. See Berman v. Bromberg (1997) 56 Cal.App.4th 936, 947; Saberi v. Bakhiari (1985) 169 Cal.App.3d 509,515 n.6. =(501/AJR)

rulings.Case Title: HELEN LOWE VS. CELESTE AMAYA et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion To Compel Responses To Discovery To Establish Admissions From Defts And Request For Monetary Sanctions Against Defts
rulings.Rulings: Unlawful Detainer Law and Motion Calendar for Thursday October. 11, 2012. Line 6 - PLAINTIFF HELEN LOWE's Motion To Compel Responses To Discovery To Establish Admissions From Defendants And Request For Monetary Sanctions. Plaintiff's Motion to Compel Responses to Discovery, to Establish Admissions and for Sanctions is granted, subject top opposition. Sanctions of $760 total. =(501/AJR)
